title: Multiple-choice cloze
description: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text:
In what can only be described as an impressive (0) ...... of research, a schoolboy in the USA has calculated that the state and federal governments could save getting on for $400m a year by changing the typeface they use for printed documents.

Shocked by the number of printed handouts he was receiving from his teachers, the 14-year-old boy decided to investigate the cost. He established that ink (1) ...... up to 60% of the cost of a printed page and is, gram for gram, twice as expensive as some famous perfumes. He then started looking at the different typefaces and discovered that, by (2) ...... to one called Garamond with its thin, elegant strokes, his school district could reduce its ink (3) ...... by 24% annually. Working on that (4) ...... , the federal savings would be enormous.

(5) ...... , earlier studies of the (6) ...... of font choice have shown that it can affect more than just cost. The typeface that a document uses also (7) ...... how much of the information is (8) ...... and whether it is worth taking seriously.

questions.question: Example: impressive ...... of research
questions.explanation: La respuesta correcta es 'piece' (C). 'Piece of research' es una colocación común en inglés que significa 'una investigación'.

questions.question: He established that ink (1) ...... up to 60% of the cost
questions.explanation: 'Accounts for' significa 'representa' o 'constituye'. Las otras opciones: 'represents' necesitaría ser 'represents up to' pero no es la colocación más natural; 'amounts to' es posible pero menos común en este contexto; 'comprises' significa 'incluye' y no encaja.

questions.question: by (2) ...... to one called Garamond
questions.explanation: 'Switching to' significa 'cambiar a'. 'Turning to' sería 'recurrir a', 'moving to' sería 'mudarse a', 'changing to' es posible pero 'switching' es más específico para cambios de opciones.

questions.question: reduce its ink (3) ...... by 24%
questions.explanation: 'Ink consumption' es la expresión más formal y técnica para 'consumo de tinta'. 'Expenditure' es más sobre gasto monetario, 'usage' es más coloquial, 'expense' es el costo.

questions.question: Working on that (4) ...... , the federal savings would be enormous
questions.explanation: 'On that basis' significa 'sobre esa base'. 'Foundation' sería más físico, 'base' podría ser pero 'basis' es la colocación correcta, 'premise' es más lógico/filosófico.

questions.question: (5) ...... , earlier studies of the (6) ......
questions.explanation: 'Interestingly' significa 'curiosamente' o 'es interesante que'. Es el adverbio que mejor conecta con la idea de que ya se habían hecho estudios antes.

questions.question: earlier studies of the (6) ...... of font choice
questions.explanation: 'Issue' aquí significa 'tema' o 'asunto', pero con connotación de que es algo que se debate o analiza. 'Topic' y 'subject' son posibles pero 'issue' es más común en contextos académicos.

questions.question: The typeface also (7) ...... how much of the information
questions.explanation: 'Influences' significa 'influye'. 'Effects' como verbo sería 'efectúa', 'guides' sería 'guía', 'controls' sería 'controla' - todos demasiado fuertes para el contexto.

questions.question: how much of the information is (8) ......
questions.explanation: 'Retained' significa 'retenida' en el sentido de recordada. 'Reserved' es reservado, 'remembered' es recordado pero menos formal, 'recalled' es evocado. 'Retained' es la mejor opción en este contexto.
